languages.text: "Я уверен{mf||а}, что у тебя были причины. Хотелось бы их услышать".
"I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."
languages.original_text: "Я уверен{mf||а}, что у тебя были причины. Хотелось бы их услышать".

traits.locale_text: "I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."
"I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."
"I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."

languages.text: «Seguro que tiene sus motivos. Me gustaría escucharlos».
languages.original_text: "I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."

traits.locale_text: «Seguro que tiene sus motivos. Me gustaría escucharlos».

languages.text: “我确信你有你的理由。说来听听。”
languages.original_text: "I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."

traits.locale_text: “我确信你有你的理由。说来听听。”

languages.text: « J'imagine que vous aviez une bonne raison de faire ça et j'aimerais beaucoup la connaître. »
languages.original_text: "I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."

traits.locale_text: « J'imagine que vous aviez une bonne raison de faire ça et j'aimerais beaucoup la connaître. »

languages.text: "Eminim kendince sebeplerin vardır. Onları duymak isterim."
languages.original_text: "I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."

traits.locale_text: "Eminim kendince sebeplerin vardır. Onları duymak isterim."

languages.text: "Ich bin sicher, Ihr hattet Eure Gründe. Ich würde sie gerne hören."
languages.original_text: "I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin sicher, Ihr hattet Eure Gründe. Ich würde sie gerne hören."

languages.text: 「あなたには理由があったのでしょう。私はそれを聞きたい」。
languages.original_text: "I am sure that you had your reasons. I should like to hear them."
